report_name: Cilium and eBPF Highlighted for Advanced Cloud-Native Networking, Observability, and Security

tools.name: Cilium
tools.description: An open-source project that provides networking, observability, and security for cloud-native environments like Kubernetes. It uses eBPF to implement security policies, load balancing, and network visibility.

tools.name: Hubble
tools.description: A companion project to Cilium that provides deep, real-time visibility into network flows and service dependencies for observability purposes.

tools.name: Kubernetes
tools.description: A container orchestration platform for which Cilium is used to provide networking, security, and observability.

tools.name: Docker
tools.description: A container platform for which Cilium is used to provide networking, security, and observability.
